rag_rules: Insert AGREE annex blocks in component type annexes for assumptions and guarantees, and in implementation annexes for bindings.
Place input envelope assumptions and output range guarantees in annex agree only when concrete bounds or visible relations are provided.
generic_rules: Use visible feature names and named constants in AGREE contracts when available.
Ensure helper declarations match the type of the expressions they represent.
Define boolean range checks using logical conjunctions of comparison expressions.
syntax_or_pattern_reminders: AGREE contracts must be enclosed in `annex agree {** ... **};` blocks.
Component type annexes are for structural and behavioral assumptions/guarantees; implementation annexes for bindings.
anti_patterns: Avoid placing AGREE contracts outside annex blocks or in incorrect scopes.
Do not mismatch helper declaration types with expression types in AGREE.
